transcript: [{"role": "bot", "text": "Hello Divya , I am your Medical AI Assistant. Please tell me what brings you in today?"}, {"role": "patient", "text": "I am not feeling well I am having fever"}, {"role": "bot", "text": "How long have you been experiencing the fever?"}, {"role": "patient", "text": "Since 1 day"}, {"role": "bot", "text": "What is your current body temperature, and have you taken any medication to reduce the fever?"}, {"role": "patient", "text": "I have not measure the temperature yet and I have taken paracetamol"}, {"role": "bot", "text": "Are you experiencing any other symptoms such as headache, sore throat, or body aches along with the fever?"}, {"role": "patient", "text": "Yes I also have headache"}, {"role": "bot", "text": "Have you had any recent travel or exposure to someone who is sick?"}, {"role": "patient", "text": "No"}, {"role": "bot", "text": "Do you have any pre-existing medical conditions that may be contributing to your current symptoms?"}, {"role": "patient", "text": "Yes I have migraine"}, {"role": "bot", "text": "Have you experienced any nausea or vomiting along with the fever and headache?"}, {"role": "patient", "text": "No"}, {"role": "bot", "text": "Have you experienced any sensitivity to light or sound that could be related to your migraine or current symptoms?"}, {"role": "patient", "text": "Yes to light"}]
medication: {'allopathic': [{'name': 'Acetaminophen', 'dosage': '500mg', 'instruction': 'Twice daily after meals', 'purpose': 'This is an analgesic that reduces fever and blocks pain signals in the brain, providing relief from headache and body aches associated with viral fever'}, {'name': 'Ibuprofen', 'dosage': '400mg', 'instruction': 'Every 6 hours as needed', 'purpose': 'This is a nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug that reduces fever, relieves pain, and decreases inflammation, helping to alleviate symptoms of viral fever'}], 'ayurvedic': [{'remedy': 'Ginger and Honey Tea', 'benefit': 'Reduces inflammation and soothes the throat', 'usage': 'Grind 1-inch piece of fresh ginger and mix with 1 tablespoon of honey in a cup of warm water. Strain and drink slowly, 2-3 times a day', 'timing': 'On an empty stomach in the early morning and before bedtime'}, {'remedy': 'Tulsi and Lemon Juice', 'benefit': 'Boosts immunity and fights viral infections', 'usage': 'Extract juice from 5-7 tulsi leaves and mix with 1 tablespoon of lemon juice. Add to a glass of warm water and drink, 2 times a day', 'timing': 'After breakfast and after lunch'}], 'prevention': ['Practice good hygiene by washing hands frequently with soap and water, especially after using the bathroom and before eating', 'Stay hydrated by drinking plenty of fluids, such as water, herbal teas, and clear broths, to help flush out the virus', 'Get plenty of rest and avoid overexertion to help the body recover from the infection']}
